chapter_title: Licenses Issued by California Highway Patrol
text: The commissioner may adopt such regulations as are necessary to administer the provisions of this article.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2.5. Licenses Issued by California Highway Patrol [2500 - 2574]
#### Article 4. Transportation of Hazardous Material [2531 - 2532]
##### § 2532

The commissioner may adopt such regulations as are necessary to administer the provisions of this article.

*(Repealed and added by Stats. 1981, Ch. 860, Sec. 11.)*

subsections.text: The commissioner may adopt such regulations as are necessary to administer the provisions of this article.

history.raw: (Repealed and added by Stats. 1981, Ch. 860, Sec. 11.)
